member.name: T:JsonSerializable
member.summary: Base class for Json serializable objects. Implements implicit cast to string using UnityEngine.JsonUtility.ToJson.

member.name: T:Args
member.summary: Abstract base class for WAAPI command arguments.

member.name: T:WaqlArgs
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing a WAQL string.

member.name: T:ArgsObject
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing an object identfier.

member.name: T:ArgsRename
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing an object identfier and new value used when renaming an object.

member.name: T:ArgsDisplayName
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing an object identfier and name used when deleting an object.

member.name: T:ArgsCommand
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing an object identfier and command field. Used by AkWaapiUtilities.SelectObjectInAuthoringAsync().

member.name: T:ArgsPlay
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing an Event identfier and transport ID. Used to toggle Event playback.

member.name: T:ArgsTransport
member.summary: WAAPI arguments containing a transport ID. Used to specify transports in transport-specific commands.

member.name: T:Options
member.summary: Abstract base class for WAAPI command options.

member.name: T:ReturnOptions
member.summary: WAAPI options to specify the names of fields to return in a WAAPI request returning WwiseObjects.

member.name: T:TransportOptions
member.summary: WAAPI options used to specify the transport ID when subscribing.

member.name: T:ReturnTransport
member.summary: Used to deserialize the response from an ak.wwise.core.transport.create command. Contains the transport ID.

member.name: T:TransportState
member.summary: Used to deserialize transport-state information receieved from the transport.stateChanged topic.

member.name: T:ErrorMessage
member.summary: Used to deserialize WAAPI error messages.

member.name: T:ErrorDetails
member.summary: Used to deserialize details in WAAPI error messages.

member.name: T:ReturnWwiseObjects
member.summary: Class used to deserialize a WAAPI response containing Wwise objects.

member.name: T:ReturnWwiseObjects`1
member.summary: Generic class to deserialize a WAAPI response containing Wwise objects with custom return options.

member.name: T:SelectedWwiseObjects
member.summary: Class used to deserialize selected Wwise objects published on the ak.wwise.ui.selectionChanged topic.

member.name: T:WwiseRenameInfo
member.summary: Used to deserialize information published on the ak.wwise.core.@object.nameChanged topic.

member.name: T:WwiseChildModifiedInfo
member.summary: Used to deserialize information published on the ak.wwise.core.@object.childAdded and ak.wwise.core.@object.childRemoved topics.

member.name: T:WwiseObjectInfoJsonObject
member.summary: Used to deserialize information from a request for a Wwise object. Implements an implicit cast to WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: T:WwiseObjectInfoParent
member.summary: Contains the GUID of the returned object's parent.

member.name: T:WwiseObjectInfo
member.summary: Class containing the information returned by a WAAPI request for an object.

member.name: T:WaapiHelper
member.summary: Contains a helper function GetWwiseObjectTypeFromString.

member.name: T:WaapiKeywords
member.summary: Contains fields for specific WAAPI keywords.

member.name: F:WaapiKeywords.WwiseObjectTypeStrings
member.summary: Maps WwiseObjectType to strings.

member.name: F:WaapiKeywords.FolderDisplaynames
member.summary: Maps root folder names to displayed strings.

member.name: F:WaapiKeywords.typeStringDict
member.summary: Maps strings to WwiseObjectType.

member.name: T:AkWaapiClient
member.summary: The Waapi Client provides a core interface to Waapi using strings only. You will need to provide your own JSON serialization.

member.name: M:AkWaapiClient.Connect(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connect to a running instance of Wwise Authoring.
member.param: URI to connect. Usually the WebSocket protocol (ws:) followed by the hostname and port, followed by waapi.
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.

member.name: M:AkWaapiClient.Close(System.Int32)
member.summary: Close the connection.
member.param: The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.

member.name: M:AkWaapiClient.IsConnected
member.summary: Return true if the client is connected and ready for operations.

member.name: M:AkWaapiClient.Call(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Call a WAAPI remote procedure. Refer to WAAPI reference documentation for a list of URIs and their arguments and options.
member.param: The URI of the remote procedure.
The arguments of the remote procedure.
The options the remote procedure.
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.
member.returns: A JSON string with the result of the Remote Procedure Call.

member.name: M:AkWaapiClient.Subscribe(System.String,System.String,Wamp.PublishHandler,System.Int32)
member.summary: Subscribe to WAAPI topic. Refer to WAAPI reference documentation for a list of topics and their options.
member.param: The topic to which subscribe.
The options the subscription.
The delegate function to call when the topic is published.
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.
member.returns: Subscription id, that you can use to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:AkWaapiClient.Unsubscribe(System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from a subscription.
member.param: The subscription id received from the initial subscription.
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.

member.name: T:ak
member.summary: URI strings to use in WAAPI calls. For a complete description, refer to the official Wwise SDK documentation.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setMultiplePositions
member.summary: Set multiple positions for a single game object. Setting multiple positions for a single game object is a way to simulate multiple emission sources while using the resources of only one voice. This can be used to simulate wall openings, area sounds, or multiple objects emitting the same sound in the same area. See AK::SoundEngine::SetMultiplePositions.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setScalingFactor
member.summary: Set the scaling factor of a game object. Modify the attenuation computations on this game object to simulate sounds with a larger or smaller area of effect. See AK::SoundEngine::SetScalingFactor.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.postEvent
member.summary: Asynchronously post an Event to the sound engine (by event ID). See AK::SoundEngine::PostEvent.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setRTPCValue
member.summary: Set the value of a real-time parameter control. See AK::SoundEngine::SetRTPCValue.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setObjectObstructionAndOcclusion
member.summary: Set a game object's obstruction and occlusion levels. This function is used to affect how an object should be heard by a specific listener. See AK::SoundEngine::SetObjectObstructionAndOcclusion.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setListeners
member.summary: Set a single game object's active listeners. By default, all new game objects have no listeners active, but this behavior can be overridden with SetDefaultListeners(). Inactive listeners are not computed. See AK::SoundEngine::SetListeners.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.executeActionOnEvent
member.summary: Execute an action on all nodes that are referenced in the specified event in an action of type play. See AK::SoundEngine::ExecuteActionOnEvent.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setListenerSpatialization
member.summary: Set a listener's spatialization parameters. This lets you define listener-specific volume offsets for each audio channel. See AK::SoundEngine::SetListenerSpatialization.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.resetRTPCValue
member.summary: Reset the value of a real-time parameter control to its default value, as specified in the Wwise project. See AK::SoundEngine::ResetRTPCValue.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.unregisterGameObj
member.summary: Unregister a game object. Registering a game object twice does nothing. Unregistering it once unregisters it no matter how many times it has been registered. Unregistering a game object while it is in use is allowed, but the control over the parameters of this game object is lost. For example, say a sound associated with this game object is a 3D moving sound. It will stop moving when the game object is unregistered, and there will be no way to regain control over the game object. See AK::SoundEngine::UnregisterGameObj.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.stopPlayingID
member.summary: Stop the current content, associated to the specified playing ID, from playing. See AK::SoundEngine::StopPlayingID.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setGameObjectAuxSendValues
member.summary: Set the Auxiliary Busses to route the specified game object. See AK::SoundEngine::SetGameObjectAuxSendValues.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.seekOnEvent
member.summary: Seek inside all playing objects that are referenced in Play Actions of the specified Event. See AK::SoundEngine::SeekOnEvent.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.registerGameObj
member.summary: Register a game object. Registering a game object twice does nothing. Unregistering it once unregisters it no matter how many times it has been registered. See AK::SoundEngine::RegisterGameObj.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setDefaultListeners
member.summary: Set a the default active listeners for all subsequent game objects that are registered. See AK::SoundEngine::SetDefaultListeners.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setPosition
member.summary: Set the position of a game object. See AK::SoundEngine::SetPosition.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.postMsgMonitor
member.summary: Display a message in the profiler's Capture Log view.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setGameObjectOutputBusVolume
member.summary: Set the output bus volume (direct) to be used for the specified game object. See AK::SoundEngine::SetGameObjectOutputBusVolume.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.setSwitch
member.summary: Set the State of a Switch Group. See AK::SoundEngine::SetSwitch.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.stopAll
member.summary: Stop playing the current content associated to the specified game object ID. If no game object is specified, all sounds will be stopped. See AK::SoundEngine::StopAll.

member.name: F:ak.soundengine.postTrigger
member.summary: Post the specified Trigger. See AK::SoundEngine::PostTrigger.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.debug.testAssert
member.summary: Private use only.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.debug.assertFailed
member.summary: Sent when an assert has failed. This is only available with Debug builds.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.debug.enableAutomationMode
member.summary: Enable or disable the automation mode for Wwise. This reduces the potential interruptions caused by message boxes and dialogs. For instance, enabling the automation mode silently accepts: project migration, project load log, EULA acceptance, project licence display and generic message boxes.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.debug.enableAsserts
member.summary: Enables debug assertions. Every call to enableAsserts with false increments the ref count. Calling with true will decrement the ref count. This is only available with Debug builds.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.audioSourcePeaks.getMinMaxPeaksInRegion
member.summary: Get the min/max peak pairs, in a given region of an audio source, as a collection of binary strings (one per channel). The strings are base-64 encoded 16-bit signed int arrays, with min and max values being interleaved. If getCrossChannelPeaks is true, there will be only one binary string representing peaks across all channels globally.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.audioSourcePeaks.getMinMaxPeaksInTrimmedRegion
member.summary: Get the min/max peak pairs in the entire trimmed region of an audio source, for each channel, as an array of binary strings (one per channel). The strings are base-64 encoded 16-bit signed int arrays, with min and max values being interleaved. If getCrossChannelPeaks is true, there will be only one binary string representing peaks across all channels globally.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.remote.getConnectionStatus
member.summary: Retrieves the connection status.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.remote.getAvailableConsoles
member.summary: Retrieves all consoles available for connecting Wwise Authoring to a Sound Engine instance.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.remote.disconnect
member.summary: Disconnects the Wwise Authoring application from a connected Wwise Sound Engine running executable.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.remote.connect
member.summary: Connects the Wwise Authoring application to a Wwise Sound Engine running executable. The host must be running code with communication enabled.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.log.itemAdded
member.summary: Sent when an item is added to the log. This could be used to retrieve items added to the SoundBank generation log. To retrieve the complete log, refer to ak.wwise.core.log.get.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.log.get
member.summary: Retrieve the latest log for a specific channel. Refer to ak.wwise.core.log.itemadded to be notified when an item is added to the log.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.getInfo
member.summary: Retrieve global Wwise information.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.referenceChanged
member.summary: Sent when an object reference is changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.move
member.summary: Moves an object to the given parent. Returns the moved object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.attenuationCurveLinkChanged
member.summary: Sent when an attenuation curve's link/unlink is changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.childAdded
member.summary: Sent when an object is added as a child to another object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.getTypes
member.summary: Retrieves the list of all object types registered in Wwise's object model.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.propertyChanged
member.summary: Sent when the watched property of an object changes.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.create
member.summary: Creates an object of type 'type', as a child of 'parent'. Refer to ak.wwise.core.audio.import to import audio files to Wwise.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.get
member.summary: Performs a query, returns specified data for each object in query result.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.preDeleted
member.summary: Sent prior to an object's deletion.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.nameChanged
member.summary: Sent when an object is renamed. Publishes the object which the name was changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.postDeleted
member.summary: Sent following an object's deletion.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.notesChanged
member.summary: Sent when the object's notes are changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.getPropertyInfo
member.summary: Retrieves information about an object property.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.setName
member.summary: Renames an object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.setNotes
member.summary: Sets the object's notes.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.setAttenuationCurve
member.summary: Sets the specified attenuation curve for a given attenuation object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.setProperty
member.summary: Sets a property value of an object for a specific platform. Refer to ak.wwise.core.object.setreference to set a reference to an object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.copy
member.summary: Copies an object to the given parent.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.isPropertyEnabled
member.summary: Return true if a property is enabled based on the values of the properties it depends on.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.setRandomizer
member.summary: Sets the randomizer values of a property of an object for a specific platform.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.setReference
member.summary: Sets an object's reference value.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.attenuationCurveChanged
member.summary: Sent when an attenuation curve is changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.created
member.summary: Sent when an object is created.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.childRemoved
member.summary: Sent when an object is removed from the children of another object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.getPropertyNames
member.summary: Retrieves the list of property and reference names for an object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.getAttenuationCurve
member.summary: Gets the specified attenuation curve for a given attenuation object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.curveChanged
member.summary: Sent when one or many curves are changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.delete
member.summary: Deletes the specified object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.object.getPropertyAndReferenceNames
member.summary: Retrieves the list of property and reference names for an object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.undo.endGroup
member.summary: Ends the last undo group.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.undo.cancelGroup
member.summary: Cancels the last undo group. Please note that this does not revert the operations made since the last ak.wwise.core.undo.begingroup call.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.undo.beginGroup
member.summary: Begins an undo group. Make sure to call ak.wwise.core.undo.endgroup exactly once for every ak.wwise.core.beginUndoGroup call you make. Calls to ak.wwise.core.undo.beginGroup can be nested.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.profiler.getCursorTime
member.summary: Returns the current time of the specified profiler cursor in milliseconds.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.profiler.startCapture
member.summary: Start the profiler capture and return the time at the beginning of the capture in milliseconds.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.profiler.getVoiceContributions
member.summary: Retrieves all parameters affecting voice volume, highpass and lowpass for a voice path, resolved from pipeline IDs.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.profiler.getVoices
member.summary: Retrieves the voices at a specific profiler capture time.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.profiler.getBusses
member.summary: Retrieves the busses at a specific profiler capture time.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.profiler.stopCapture
member.summary: Stop the profiler capture and return the time at the end of the capture in milliseconds.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.project.postClosed
member.summary: Sent when the after the project is completely closed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.project.loaded
member.summary: Sent when the project has been successfully loaded.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.project.preClosed
member.summary: Sent when the project begins closing.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.project.save
member.summary: Saves the current project.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.project.saved
member.summary: Sent when the project has been saved.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.transport.getState
member.summary: Gets the state of the given transport object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.transport.stateChanged
member.summary: Sent when the transport's state has changed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.transport.create
member.summary: Creates a transport object for the given Wwise object. The return transport object can be used to play, stop, pause and resume the Wwise object via the other transport functions.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.transport.getList
member.summary: Returns the list of transport objects.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.transport.destroy
member.summary: Destroys the given transport object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.transport.executeAction
member.summary: Executes an action on the given transport object, or all transports if no transport is specified.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.soundbank.getInclusions
member.summary: Retrieves a SoundBank's inclusion list.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.soundbank.generated
member.summary: Sent when a single SoundBank is generated. This could be sent multiple times during SoundBank generation, for every SoundBank generated and for every platform. To generate SoundBanks, refer to ak.wwise.ui.commands.execute with one of the SoundBank generation commands.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.soundbank.setInclusions
member.summary: Modifies a SoundBank's inclusion list. The 'operation' argument determines how the 'inclusions' argument modifies the SoundBank's inclusion list; 'inclusions' may be added to / removed from / replace the SoundBank's inclusion list.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.audio.import
member.summary: Create Wwise objects and import audio files. This function is using the same importation processor available through the Tab Delimited import in the Audio File Importer. The function returns an array of all objects created, replaced or re-used. Use the options to specify how the objects are returned.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.audio.importTabDelimited
member.summary: Scripted object creation and audio file import from a tab-delimited file.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.audio.imported
member.summary: Sent at the end of an import operation.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.switchContainer.removeAssignment
member.summary: Remove an assignment between a Switch Container's child and a State.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.switchContainer.getAssignments
member.summary: Returns the list of assignments between a Switch Container's children and states.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.switchContainer.assignmentRemoved
member.summary: Sent when an assignment is removed from a Switch Container.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.switchContainer.assignmentAdded
member.summary: Sent when an assignment is added to a Switch Container.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.plugin.getList
member.summary: Retrieves the list of all object types registered in Wwise's object model.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.plugin.getProperty
member.summary: Retrieves information about an object property.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.core.plugin.getProperties
member.summary: Retrieves the list of property and reference names for an object.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.project.close
member.summary: Closes the current project.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.project.open
member.summary: Opens a project, specified by path. Please refer to ak.wwise.core.project.loaded for further explanations on how to be notified when the operation has completed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.bringToForeground
member.summary: Bring Wwise main window to foreground. Refer to SetForegroundWindow and AllowSetForegroundWindow on MSDN for more information on the restrictions. Refer to ak.wwise.core.getInfo to obtain the Wwise process ID for AllowSetForegroundWindow.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.commands.unregister
member.summary: Unregister an array of add-on UI commands.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.commands.executed
member.summary: Sent when a command is executed. The objects for which the command is executed are sent in the publication.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.commands.execute
member.summary: Executes a command. Some commands can take a list of objects as parameter.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.commands.register
member.summary: Register an array of add-on commands. Registered commands remain until the Wwise process is terminated. Refer to to ak.wwise.ui.commands.executed.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.commands.getCommands
member.summary: Get the list of commands.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.getSelectedObjects
member.summary: Retrieves the list of objects currently selected by the user in the active view.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.ui.selectionChanged
member.summary: Sent when the selection changes in the project.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.waapi.getTopics
member.summary: Retrieve the list of topics to which a client can subscribe.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.waapi.getFunctions
member.summary: Retrieve the list of functions.

member.name: F:ak.wwise.waapi.getSchema
member.summary: Retrieve the JSON schema of a Waapi URI.

member.name: T:Wamp
member.summary: WAMP protocol implementation using only strings and regular expressions. This implements only a subset of the WAMP feature set and is only compatible with Wwise.

member.name: T:Wamp.TimeoutException
member.summary: Exception thrown during WAMP operations when the timeout is reached.

member.name: T:Wamp.ErrorException
member.summary: Exception thrown during WAMP operations.

member.name: T:Wamp.Messages
member.summary: Messages ids defined by the WAMP protocol

member.name: T:Wamp.Response
member.summary: Encapsulate a response from the server.

member.name: T:Wamp.PublishHandler
member.summary: Publish events are delegates registered with Subscribe.

member.name: M:Wamp.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a WAMP message from the server.

member.name: M:Wamp.Receive(System.Int32)
member.summary: Wait for the next response

member.name: M:Wamp.ReceiveExpect(Wamp.Messages,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Wait for the next response and do some validation on the response
member.param: What message to expect
What request id to expect
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise exception when timeout is reached.

member.name: M:Wamp.Connect(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Connect to the specified host, handshake and prepare the listening task.
member.param: The URI of the host, usually something like ws://host:port
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise exception when timeout is reached.

member.name: M:Wamp.IsConnected
member.summary: Tell the connection state of the WebSocket client.
member.returns: Return true if the connection is open and ready.

member.name: M:Wamp.Close(System.Int32)
member.summary: Close the connection.
member.param: The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise exception when timeout is reached.

member.name: M:Wamp.Call(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Invoke an RPC function from the uri
member.param: URI of the function
Arguments
Options
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise exception when Waapi.TimeoutException is reached.

member.name: M:Wamp.Subscribe(System.String,System.String,Wamp.PublishHandler,System.Int32)
member.summary: Subscribe to a WAMP topic.
member.param: The topic to which subscribe.
The options the subscription.
The delegate function to call when the topic is published.
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.
member.returns: Subscription id, that you can use to unsubscribe.

member.name: M:Wamp.Unsubscribe(System.UInt32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from a subscription.
member.param: The subscription id received from the initial subscription.
The maximum timeout in milliseconds for the function to execute. Will raise Waapi.TimeoutException when timeout is reached.

member.name: T:AkWaapiUtilities
member.summary: This class wraps the client that communicates with the Wwise Authoring application via WAAPI. Given that only one request can be pending on the websocket, a queue is used to consume all calls sequentially. Messages sent to WAAPI use the JSON format and are serialized by Unity Json serialization. Helper classes (\ref WaapiHelper) for serialization, keywords for WAAPI commands (\ref WaapiKeywords), and classes for serializing message arguments and deserializing responses are found in AkWaapiHelper.cs. Uri.cs contains classes with fields containing URI strings for WAAPI calls and error messages.

member.name: F:AkWaapiUtilities.Disconnecting
member.summary: Fired when the connection is closing or closed, the bool parameter represents whether the socket connection is still open (for cleaning up subscriptions).

member.name: F:AkWaapiUtilities.Connected
member.summary: Fired when the connection is established, should be used by external classes to subscribe to topics they are interested in.

member.name: F:AkWaapiUtilities.QueueConsumed
member.summary: Fired when all commands in the queue have been executed.

member.name: T:AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate`1
member.summary: Generic delegate function for callbacks that expect to receive a list of objects in response to a WAAPI request.

member.name: T:AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultDelegate`1
member.summary: Generic delegate function for callbacks that expect to receive a single object in response to a WAAPI request.

member.name: F:AkWaapiUtilities.dataPath
member.summary: Used to store store UnityEngine.Application.dataPath because we can't access it outside of the main loop

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.#cctor
member.summary: Bind disconnection method to compilation started delegate and start the async Waapi loop.

member.name: T:AkWaapiUtilities.WaapiCommand
member.summary: A simple structure containing an async payload function that will be executed when it is consumed by the command queue.

member.name: T:AkWaapiUtilities.SubscriptionInfo
member.summary: Class used to store information about a specific subscription.

member.name: T:AkWaapiUtilities.TransportInfo
member.summary: Holds information about a playing transport.

member.name: P:AkWaapiUtilities.ItemTransports
member.summary: Stores TransportInfo of playing Events.

member.name: P:AkWaapiUtilities.WaapiClient
member.summary: WAAPI client wrapping WAMP calls. Lazy instantiated.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.IsConnected
member.summary: Check whether the client is currently connected.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Loop
member.summary: Main loop for the WAAPI API. Checks if the client is connected and consumes all commands.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.ConsumeCommandQueue
member.summary: Consumes all WAAPICommands in the queue and then fires QueueConsumed.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.CheckConnection
member.summary: Checks the global WAAPI settings and disconnects if WAAPI is disabled or connection settings have changed. If disconnected, try to connect with current settings.
member.returns: True if the client is connected

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.CheckProjectLoaded
member.summary: Tries to communicate with Wwise and compares the current open project with the project path specified in the Unity Wwise Editor settings.
member.returns: True if the correct wwise project is open in Wwise.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.FireDisconnect(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Starts the diconnection process. Invokes Disconnecting() so that other classes using WAAPI can clean up and add commands to unsubscribe from topics. Consumes the last batch of commands in the command queue then closes the client.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Disconnected
member.summary: Invoked after the client has disconnected from Wwise authoring.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetStatusString
member.summary: Returns a rich text string representing the current WAAPI connection status.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.QueueCommand(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Use this function to enqueue a command with no expected return object.
member.param: The URI of the waapi command
The command-specific arguments
The command-specific options

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.QueueCommandWithReturnType``1(System.String,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultDelegate{``0},System.String,System.String)
member.typeparam: Type of the expected return object
member.param: The URI of the waapi command
The command-specific arguments
The command-specific options
Function accepting an argument of type T

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.QueueCommandWithReturnWwiseObjects``1(WaqlArgs,ReturnOptions,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Enqueues a command with a payload that desirializes the list of wwise objects from the response.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetWwiseObject``1(System.Guid,ReturnOptions,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Generic function for fetching a Wwise object with custom return options.
member.typeparam: Type of the object to be deserialized from the response.
member.param: GUID of the target object.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
Function accteping a list of T objects.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetWwiseObjects``1(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid},ReturnOptions,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Generic function for fetching a list of Wwise objects with custom return options.
member.typeparam: Type of the object to be deserialized from the response.
member.param: GUIDs of the target objects.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
Function accteping a list of T objects.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetWwiseObjectAndAncestors``1(System.Guid,ReturnOptions,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Enqueues a waapi command to fetch the specified object and all of its ancestors in the hierarchy. Passes the list of WwiseObjectInfo containing the specified object and ancestors to the callback.
member.param: GUID of the target object.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
Function accepting a list of WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetWwiseObjectAndDescendants``1(System.Guid,ReturnOptions,System.Int32,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Enqueues a waapi comand to fetch the specified object and all of its descendants in the hierarchy to a specified depth. Passes the list of WwiseObjectInfo containing the specified object and descendants to the callback.
member.param: GUID of the target object.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
Depth of descendants to fetch. If -1, fetches all descendants.
Function accepting a list of WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetWwiseObjectAndDescendants``1(System.String,ReturnOptions,System.Int32,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Composes a WAQL "from object" request based on the parameters and enqueues a WAAPI command. Passes the list of WwiseObjectInfo containing the results to the callback
member.param: Can bethe target object GUID or path within the hierarchy.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
Depth of descendants to fetch. If -1, fetches all descendants.
Function accepting a list of WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Search``1(System.String,WwiseObjectType,ReturnOptions,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Composes a WAQL "search" request based on the parameters and enqueues a WAAPI command. Passes the list of WwiseObjectInfo containing the search results to the callback
member.param: Characters to search for.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
An optional object type used to filter search results.
Function accepting a list of WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetChildren``1(System.Guid,ReturnOptions,AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0})
member.summary: Get the children of a given object.
member.param: GUID of the target object.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response
Function accepting a list of WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetProject``1(AkWaapiUtilities.GetResultListDelegate{``0},ReturnOptions)
member.summary: Get the WwiseObjectInfo for the project.
member.param: Function accepting a list of WwiseObjectInfo. The first element of the list will be the project info.
Specifies which object properties to include in the response

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.ParseObjectInfo(System.Collections.Generic.List{WwiseObjectInfoJsonObject})
member.summary: Parse the response WwiseObjectInfoJsonObject of a "from object" request and implicit cast the objects to WwiseObjectInfo.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.SelectObjectInAuthoring(System.Guid)
member.summary: Select the object in Wwise Authoring. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to SelectObjectInAuthoringAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: GUID of the object to be selected.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.SelectObjectInAuthoringAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Creates and sends a WAAPI command to select a Wwise object.
member.param: GUID of the object to be selected.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.OpenWorkUnitInExplorer(System.Guid)
member.summary: Open the OS file browser to the folder containing this object's Work Unit. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to OpenWorkUnitInExplorerAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: GUID of the object to be found.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.OpenSoundBankInExplorer(System.Guid)
member.summary: Open the OS file browser to the folder containing the generated SoundBank. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to OpenSoundBankInExplorer and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: GUID of the SoundBank to be found.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.OpenWorkUnitInExplorerAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Uses a waapi call to get the object's file path, then opens the containing folder in the system's file browser.
member.param: GUID of the object to be found.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.OpenSoundBankInExplorerAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Uses a waapi call to get the SoundBank's generated bank path, then opens the containing folder in the system's file browser.
member.param: GUID of the object to be found.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Rename(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Rename an object in Wwise authoring. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to RenameAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: GUID of the object to be renamed.
New name for the wwise object.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.RenameAsync(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Sends a WAAPI command to rename a Wwise object.
member.param: GUID of the object to be renamed.
New name for the wwise object.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Delete(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete an object in wwise authoring. Work Units cannot be deleted in this manner. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to DeleteAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: GUID of the object to be deleted.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.DeleteAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Sends three WAAPI commands: 1. Begin an undo group. 2. Delete the specified object. 3. Close the undo group.
member.param: GUID of the object to be deleted.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.IsPlayable(WwiseObjectType)
member.summary: Checks if Wwise object is playable.
member.param: WwiseObjectType of object to check.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.TogglePlayEvent(WwiseObjectType,System.Guid)
member.summary: Play or pause an object in Wwise authoring. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to TogglePlayEventAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: Used to check whether the object is playable.
GUID of the object to be played.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.TogglePlayEventAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Play or pause an object in Wwise authoring. Opens a new transport in wwise to play the sound if it does not exist yet.
member.param: GUID of the object to be played.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.GetTransport(System.Guid)
member.summary: Find the open transport in ItemTransports or create a new one.
member.param: GUID of the object.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.CreateTransport(System.Guid)
member.summary: Send a WAAPI call to create a transport in Wwise. Subscribe to the ak.wwise.core.transport.stateChanged topic of the new transport. Add the transport info to ItemTransports.
member.param: GUID of the Event

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.HandleTransportStateChanged(System.String)
member.summary: Handle the messages published by a transport when its state is changed. If stopped, enqueue a command with DestroyTransport as its payload.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.StopTransport(System.Int32)
member.summary: Send a WAAPI command to stop the specific transport.
member.param: ID of the transport.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.DestroyTransport(System.Guid)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from the transport topic and send a WAAPI command to destroy the transport in Wwise.
member.param: GUID of the Event.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.StopAllTransports
member.summary: Stops all playing transports. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to StopAllTransportsAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.StopAllTransportsAsync
member.summary: Stops all playing transports.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Subscribe(System.String,Wamp.PublishHandler,System.Action{AkWaapiUtilities.SubscriptionInfo})
member.summary: Subscribe to WAAPI topic. Refer to WAAPI reference documentation for a list of topics and their options. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to SubscribeAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: The topic URI to subscribe to.
Delegate function to call when the topic is published.
Action to be executed once the subscription has been made. This should store the subscription ID so that the subscription can be cleaned up when it is no longer needed.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.SubscribeAsync(AkWaapiUtilities.SubscriptionInfo)
member.summary: Subscribe to WAAPI topic. Refer to WAAPI reference documentation for a list of topics and their options. Creates and sends a WAAPI command to subscribe to the topic.
member.param: SubscriptionInfo object containing the topic URI and the message handling callback.
member.returns: Updated SubscriptionInfo object containing the subscription ID (uint).

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.Unsubscribe(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from an existing subscription. Creates a WaapiCommand object containing a lambda call to UnsubscribeAsync and adds it to the waapiCommandQueue.
member.param: The subscription ID received from the initial subscription.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.UnsubscribeAsync(System.UInt32)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from a subscription.
member.param: The subscription ID received from the initial subscription.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.ParseSelectedObjects(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the objects published by the ak.wwise.ui.selectionChanged topic.
member.param: Json string containing the message.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.ParseRenameObject(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the object published by the ak.wwise.core.object.nameChanged topic.
member.param: Json string containing the message.
member.returns: WwiseRenameInfo containing the object information and the new name.

member.name: M:AkWaapiUtilities.ParseChildAddedOrRemoved(System.String)
member.summary: Deserializes the object published by the ak.wwise.core.object.childAdded or ak.wwise.core.object.childRemoved topic.
member.param: Json string containing the message.
member.returns: WwiseChildModifiedInfo containing parent and child object information.
